title: Evangelion BD Re release
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion BD Re-release             Quote Post by xtr00kvltcorex » Mon Jun 24, 2019 10:44 pm Please delete is disallowed, I've been away from the forum for a year or so, and my searches have yielded little information (sorry), so with that being said: I keep reading tidbits about another Evangelion BD release in Japan? Any details that can be shared would be appreciated. Thanks!

[]: Re: Evangelion BD Re-release             Quote Post by pwhodges » Tue Jun 25, 2019 3:36 am It's just a cheaper release of the existing set, with less extras, I think (I haven't looked into it, as I already have the other).

[]: Re: Evangelion BD Re-release             Quote Post by xtr00kvltcorex » Tue Jun 25, 2019 8:06 am no English subs I imagine?

[]: Re: Evangelion BD Re-release             Quote Post by pwhodges » Tue Jun 25, 2019 12:22 pm Not as far as we know.

[]: Re: Evangelion BD Re-release             Quote Post by xtr00kvltcorex » Tue Jun 25, 2019 12:35 pm Do we have any ideas on a release date, I've been out of the loop. I appreciate your help.

[]: Re: Evangelion BD Re-release             Quote Post by robersora » Tue Jun 25, 2019 1:17 pm Here is what 30 seconds of googling brought up. SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: Evangelion BD Re-release             Quote Post by xtr00kvltcorex » Tue Jun 25, 2019 3:58 pm I'm on my crappy work computer, so my bad. But thank you for the info.
